title: Microalbumin Creatinine Ratio: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
and understanding results .
Is there anything else I need to know about a microalbumin creatinine ratio? 
It's easy to confuse prealbumin with albumin. Although they sound similar, prealbumin is a different type of protein. A prealbumin test Â is not part of testing your kidney health.
